hero.subtitle: Compare anything. From gadgets to fruits, concepts to software. Discover the relationship, key differences, and which one is right for you.

methodology.label: Methodology
methodology.title: How Our Comparisons Are Generated
methodology.pipelineDesc: Every comparison goes through a rigorous 4-phase process designed to produce balanced, evidence-based analysis.
methodology.phase1Desc: We search the web across 5-8 different angles per entity, gathering information from official sources, reviews, benchmarks, and expert analysis.
methodology.phase2Desc: An AI architect analyzes the relationship between the two entities and generates 4-6 comparison dimensions specifically tailored to them. No generic templates.
methodology.phase3Desc: Each dimension is analyzed independently with scores on a 0-10 scale. Each analysis cites 1-2 web sources that directly support the findings.
methodology.phase4Desc: A final phase extracts pros and cons for each entity and produces an actionable recommendation with a clear verdict.
methodology.dataSource1: Web search via multiple query angles covering factual overviews, technical specifications, expert reviews, and recent news
methodology.dataSource2: Each claim in the analysis is linked to its original source URL for transparency
methodology.dataSource3: Scores are based on publicly available benchmarks, reviews, and specifications
methodology.scoring1: All scores use a 0-10 scale where 10 represents the most favorable outcome
methodology.scoring2: For negative dimensions (e.g., risk, cost), lower real-world values receive higher scores
methodology.scoring3: Scores are relative within the comparison, not absolute ratings
methodology.editorial1: Comparisons are AI-generated and reviewed by the CompareAI Editorial Team
methodology.editorial2: Featured comparisons undergo quality review before publication
methodology.editorial3: Our methodology is continuously updated as AI capabilities improve
methodology.limitation1: AI analysis may contain inaccuracies — always verify critical decisions with primary sources
methodology.limitation2: Scores are relative within each comparison and should not be compared across reports
methodology.limitation3: Data freshness depends on available web sources at the time of generation

about.label: About
about.title: About CompareAI
about.whatWeDoDesc: CompareAI is a free AI-powered comparison engine that analyzes any two entities — products, concepts, technologies, services, or ideas. Our multi-agent AI pipeline uses web research to produce factual, source-backed comparisons with dimension-by-dimension scoring, pros and cons, and actionable recommendations.
about.whyDesc: Comparison searches are among the most common decision-making queries on the web. Existing comparison tools often lack depth, structured analysis, and source transparency. We built CompareAI to provide AI-powered comparisons that are backed by real web sources — not just LLM opinions.
about.teamDesc: CompareAI is built and maintained by the CompareAI Editorial Team. We combine AI engineering expertise with editorial rigor to deliver reliable comparison reports.
about.editorial1: Every featured comparison is reviewed for accuracy and completeness
about.editorial2: Sources are automatically collected from web research and linked directly in reports
about.editorial3: We prioritize factual, verifiable claims over subjective opinions
about.editorial4: Reports are updated when significant new information becomes available
about.contactDesc: For questions, feedback, or partnership inquiries, please reach out via our website.

feedback.question: Was this comparison helpful?
feedback.stats: {{pct}}% of readers found this helpful ({{total}} votes)

report.notFound: Report not found. It may have been deleted.
report.loadFailed: Failed to load report. Please try again.

privacy.label: Privacy Policy
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introDesc: CompareAI ("we", "us", or "our") respects your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you use our AI-powered comparison service at compare-anythings.com.
privacy.dataCollectionDesc: We collect limited information to provide and improve our service:
privacy.dataCollection1: Comparison inputs: The entities you submit for comparison (e.g., "MacBook Air" vs "iPad Pro")
privacy.dataCollection2: Usage data: Anonymous visitor identifiers, page views, and interaction patterns
privacy.dataCollection3: Technical data: Browser type, device information, and IP address (for analytics and abuse prevention)
privacy.dataCollection4: Feedback: Helpful/not helpful votes you submit on comparison reports
privacy.dataUse1: Generate AI-powered comparison reports based on your inputs
privacy.dataUse2: Improve our comparison quality and service reliability
privacy.dataUse3: Detect and prevent abuse or misuse of the service
privacy.aiProcessingDesc: Your comparison inputs are sent to third-party AI providers (including xAI/Grok) to generate analysis. These providers may process your inputs according to their own privacy policies. We do not send personal identifiers to AI providers — only the comparison entities you submit.
privacy.cookiesDesc: We use a single essential cookie (compareai_visitor_id) to maintain your session and enable features like feedback voting. This cookie does not track you across other websites and contains no personal information.
privacy.thirdPartyDesc: We use third-party AI providers for comparison generation and web research. We do not sell, share, or transfer your personal data to third parties for marketing purposes.
privacy.retentionDesc: Comparison reports are stored indefinitely to serve as public reference content. Anonymous analytics data is retained for up to 12 months. You may request deletion of specific comparison reports by contacting us.
privacy.rightsDesc: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your data. Since we collect minimal personal information, most data we store is anonymous. To make a request, please contact us through our website.
privacy.changesDesc: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date. Continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of the revised policy.
privacy.contactDesc: For privacy-related questions or data requests, please reach out via our website contact channels.

terms.label: Terms of Service
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.acceptanceDesc: By accessing or using CompareAI (compare-anythings.com), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the service.
terms.serviceDesc: CompareAI is a free AI-powered comparison engine that generates analytical reports comparing two entities. Reports include dimension-based scoring, pros and cons, and recommendations based on web research and AI analysis.
terms.aiContentDesc: All comparison reports are generated by artificial intelligence. You acknowledge that:
terms.aiContent1: AI-generated content may contain inaccuracies, outdated information, or errors
terms.aiContent2: Reports should not be the sole basis for important decisions — always verify with primary sources
terms.aiContent3: Scores and recommendations are relative within each comparison and do not constitute professional advice
terms.userConduct1: Do not use the service to generate harmful, illegal, or misleading comparisons
terms.userConduct2: Do not attempt to overload, disrupt, or reverse-engineer the service
terms.userConduct3: Do not use automated tools to submit bulk comparison requests without authorization
terms.ipDesc: The CompareAI platform, design, and code are owned by us. AI-generated comparison reports are provided for informational purposes. You may share and reference reports with proper attribution to CompareAI.
terms.disclaimerDesc: The service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind, express or implied. We do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or reliability of any AI-generated content. Use of the service is at your own risk.
terms.limitationDesc: To the fullest extent permitted by law, CompareAI shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service or reliance on AI-generated content.
terms.terminationDesc: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate access to the service at any time, for any reason, without prior notice. This includes cases of suspected abuse or violation of these terms.
terms.changesDesc: We may modify these Terms of Service at any time. Changes take effect immediately upon posting. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
terms.contactDesc: For questions about these Terms of Service, please reach out via our website contact channels.
